dimension_scores.label: Problem fit
dimension_scores.rationale: Handles throughput requirements well but lacks native schema evolution; Glue Schema Registry is a separate service adding integration complexity.

dimension_scores.label: Ecosystem maturity
dimension_scores.rationale: Mature AWS service with strong SLA and long track record, though its open-source ecosystem is narrower than Kafka.

dimension_scores.label: Total cost of ownership
dimension_scores.rationale: On-demand mode at 10M events/day estimated at $800-$1,500/month — the most cost-effective option evaluated.

dimension_scores.label: Operational overhead
dimension_scores.rationale: Fully serverless with on-demand mode; no shard management; native CloudWatch metrics reduce monitoring setup.

dimension_scores.label: Risk and lock-in
dimension_scores.rationale: Deep AWS ecosystem coupling; migrating consumers and producers to another platform requires significant rework.

dimension_scores.label: Skill match
dimension_scores.rationale: Strong fit for AWS-native teams; teams with Kafka backgrounds face a Kinesis-specific learning curve.
